description: Research three AI-related bills from the 118th Congress (2023-2024) on Congress.gov: H.R. 926, S. 2293, and H.R. 5077. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'AI Legislation 118th' containing the overview pages for each bill. Download the PDF full text of H.R. 5077 to ~/Documents/Bills/hr5077_text.pdf. Create a status report at ~/Documents/legislative_report.json containing the session, topic, and a list of bills with their number, short title, primary sponsor name, introduced date (YYYY-MM-DD), and latest action date (YYYY-MM-DD).
